shots.focus: The desk items are in focus initially, then rack focus to the man. Shallow depth of field.
shots.composition: The shot opens on a desk with a nameplate for "Brian Baumgartner Interim Manager," a "WORLD'S BEST DOG" trophy, and a calendar showing "06 OCTOBER." The camera tilts up and pulls back to reveal Brian Baumgartner in a suit, wearing a headset and intensely playing a video game at his desk in an office setting. The mood is one of comedic secrecy, as he is clearly not working.
shots.audio:
[Upbeat hip-hop music starts]
Man: "...just step on 'em."

shots.focus: Brian Baumgartner is in sharp focus.
shots.composition: Brian Baumgartner sits at his desk, still playing the video game with intense focus and frustration. He communicates with other players through his headset. After losing, he yells in frustration, throws the controller on the keyboard, and rips the headset off before a phone begins to ring loudly.
shots.audio: Man: "They're on me! I'm getting cooked. Check my six! Check my six! [Frustrated noises] FUCK! [Sound of controller and headset being thrown down] [Phone ringing]"

shots.focus: The phone screen is in sharp focus.
shots.composition: This is a close-up shot of an office phone's digital display. The green screen shows an incoming call from "THE CEO" and indicates there are "(6) Missed Calls." A hand enters the frame and picks up the receiver, creating a sense of urgency and panic.

shots.focus: The man's face is in sharp focus. Very shallow depth of field.
shots.composition: A tight shot on Brian Baumgartner's face as he answers the phone. He quickly shifts his expression from panicked to a pleasant, professional smile. He puts on a friendly voice, starkly contrasting his earlier outburst.

shots.focus: The man is in sharp focus.
shots.composition: Returning to the medium shot, Brian is on the phone, leaning back in his chair with a relaxed but feigned professional posture. He reassures his boss that everything is fine and that everyone is working hard, gesturing for emphasis. The scene highlights the comedic deception.
shots.audio: Man: "No, no, no, no, no, everything's good here. Everybody is working, working, working hard."

shots.focus: The mannequins in the cubicles are in focus.
shots.composition: A point-of-view shot from inside the office, looking out through the blinds into the main office area. The 'employees' are revealed to be mannequins with wigs, all sitting silently at their desks. This shot provides the visual punchline to his lie.
shots.audio: Man (V.O.): "Nobody has left their desk all day."

shots.focus: The man is in sharp focus.
shots.composition: Back on Brian, who is now laughing heartily while still on the phone, clearly proud of his deception. He continues the charade, confirming he is monitoring his 'employees'. He ends the call with a polite sign-off.
shots.audio: Man: "I've been keeping an eye on 'em. [Laughs] Thank you. Thank you, sir. [Hangs up phone]"

shots.focus: The man is in sharp focus.
shots.composition: A close-up on Brian's face. He sighs in relief after the call, then his expression shifts back to determination as he puts his gaming headset back on, ready to resume his game. The camera captures his swift change in priorities.

shots.focus: The man is in sharp focus.
shots.composition: In a full circle moment, Brian is back at his desk, headset on, and picking up the controller. He smiles, fully re-engaging with his video game, demonstrating that the call was just a brief interruption to his slacking.
shots.audio:
[Upbeat hip-hop music resumes]
Man: "Just step on 'em... Alright, I'm back in."

shots.focus: The entire scene is in focus.
shots.composition: The camera pulls back from the office window, revealing the blinds again. The viewer is now outside the office looking in, reinforcing the theme of observation. The music swells as the shot widens, transitioning from the comedic office sketch to a more stylized music video aesthetic.

shots.focus: The mannequin in the foreground is in focus, then the focus shifts as the camera moves.
shots.composition: The camera tracks backward through the office full of mannequins. In the foreground, a mannequin stylized to look like Drake, complete with a beard, glasses, headset, and colorful hair clips, comes into view. This surreal image establishes the shift into the main part of the music video.

shots.focus: The entire scene is in focus.
shots.composition: The camera continues to track left through the office, passing more cubicles with mannequins. The camera move ends by focusing on a closed office door with a sign that reads "MEETING IN PROGRESS." The lighting is sterile and corporate.
shots.graphicsOverlays:
and
J. COLE
in association with
OVO & DREAMVILLE

shots.composition: A rapid zoom effect through the crack between the two meeting room doors. The camera hurtles from the bright office into a dark, mysterious room, creating a dramatic transition. The movement is disorienting and builds anticipation.

Inside the darkened meeting room, a crowd of people in business attire surrounds a conference table that has been converted into a ping-pong table. Drake and J. Cole stand at opposite ends, preparing for a match, with another man standing as a referee. The scene is dramatic and intense, like a high-stakes showdown.
shots.audio: [Music continues with lyrics and crowd cheering SFX]

shots.composition: An over-the-shoulder shot from behind Drake, looking at J. Cole across the table. J. Cole is focused and ready to play. The crowd behind him is animated and cheering.
A reverse over-the-shoulder shot from behind J. Cole, showing Drake as he serves the ping-pong ball. The crowd behind Drake is equally energetic, hyping him up. The competitive energy is palpable.

shots.focus: The action is kept in focus.
shots.composition: A rapid montage of the ping-pong match. Quick cuts show close-ups of Drake and J. Cole hitting the ball with intensity and flair, interspersed with shots of the hyped-up crowd reacting to every point. The editing is fast-paced to match the energy of the game and the music.
shots.audio: [Music continues, ball hitting table SFX, crowd cheering]

shots.focus: The man and the chalkboard are in focus.
shots.composition: A man in a shirt and tie stands seriously in front of a large chalkboard. The chalkboard has a hand-drawn tournament bracket for the "Inaugural Corporate Clash," featuring names like Drake, J. Cole, Kai, and Oliver. This shot grounds the playful competition in a more formal, exaggerated tournament structure.

The scene has transformed into a massive, dark stadium filled with lights from the crowd. The ping-pong table is now on a stage in the center. Drake throws a paddle into the air, which morphs into a 3D animated logo for the "Inaugural Corporate Clash," featuring OVO and Dreamville logos.
shots.graphicsOverlays: Inaugural CORPORATE CLASH, OVO logo, Dreamville logo

shots.composition: Inside the stadium, Drake raps directly to the camera while playing ping pong. He is dressed in all black and moves around his side of the table with confidence. The massive, dark arena setting elevates the ping pong match to a spectacular, epic scale.

shots.focus: The action is kept in focus.
shots.composition: Another fast-paced montage of the ping-pong match in the stadium. The camera cuts between Drake, J. Cole, and the massive, cheering crowd. The shots are dynamic and filled with motion, capturing the high energy of the performance and the fictional sporting event.

shots.movement: zoom out and zoom in (whip zoom)
shots.composition: A bird's-eye view of the entire stadium. The camera rapidly zooms out, showing the vastness of the arena and the thousands of lights from the crowd, then zooms back in just as quickly towards the center stage. This emphasizes the grand scale of the event.

A wide, centered shot of the ping-pong stage inside the stadium. Drake and J. Cole face each other across the table, with the referee standing between them. Spotlights from above illuminate the stage, creating a dramatic, cinematic feel.

shots.focus: The ball is in focus as it travels.
shots.composition: A low-angle shot from the perspective of the table, looking straight up. A ping-pong ball soars high into the air, a tiny white dot against the dark expanse of the stadium ceiling and bright lights. The shot creates a sense of awe and suspense.

Drake stands on his side of the stage, looking up at the high-flying ball. He patiently waits for it to descend, calculating his next move with a look of intense concentration. The shot builds tension for the climactic point.
J. Cole, on the opposite side of the table, prepares to receive the shot. He is crouched and ready, his eyes tracking the ball. His posture indicates he is ready for a powerful return.

A quick montage of crowd reactions. People are shown screaming, cheering, and reacting with shock and excitement. One person is wearing a large bulldog mascot head, adding to the surreal atmosphere. The cuts are fast and energetic.

shots.focus: The action is kept in focus.
shots.composition: Another rapid montage of the ping-pong match, the cheering crowd, and the players' intense faces. The editing style emphasizes the speed and high stakes of the game, mirroring the lyrical content of the song.

shots.focus: The chess piece is in focus.
shots.composition: The camera zooms into what appears to be a void but is revealed to be the inside of a black chess piece (a rook). The interior is lined with stadium seating and lights, cleverly transitioning the theme from one game to another.

shots.focus: The chessboard and hands are in focus.
shots.composition: The scene shifts to a quiet, dimly lit room with blue walls. A hand moves a chess piece on a board. The camera pans up to reveal Drake and J. Cole are now engaged in a serious game of chess, a stark contrast to the high-energy ping-pong match.

Drake, wearing a green patterned shirt, sits across the chessboard, contemplating his move with a thoughtful expression. Behind him on the blue wall hangs an ornate gold frame containing a primitive, chalk-like drawing of a four-legged creature, an artistic nod to the album's theme.

A close-up on J. Cole's face as he raps his verse. He looks directly at Drake, gesturing with his hand as he speaks. The lighting is moody and focused, highlighting his intensity and confidence in the game.
A close-up of Drake's face, reacting to J. Cole's words and moves. He looks serious and contemplative, stroking his beard as he listens and plans his next move in their strategic battle.
Another close-up of J. Cole, who continues to look focused and thoughtful. The shot emphasizes the mental nature of the chess game, contrasting with the physical ping-pong match earlier.

shots.focus: Both men and the board are in focus.
shots.composition: A two-shot of Drake and J. Cole facing each other over the chessboard. Drake makes a move with a white piece. J. Cole looks up from the board, speaking to Drake with a confident, almost challenging expression.

shots.focus: The chess pieces are in sharp focus.
shots.composition: An extreme close-up, slow-motion shot of a black chess piece (a bishop) knocking over the white king. As the king falls, it shatters and crumbles into dust, symbolizing a decisive defeat.
A close-up of Drake's reaction to losing the chess game. He looks down in defeat and slowly covers his face with his hand, conveying disappointment and the end of the battle.

The scene transitions to a sports broadcast on a jumbotron. The broadcast, called "BARK SPORTS," recaps the "Competition of the Century." It introduces "Jermaine Cole" and "Aubrey Graham" with fighter-style graphics showing their stats: Age, Height, Team (Dreamville vs. OVO), Albums, and Hometown.
shots.graphicsOverlays: BARK SPORTS, JERMAINE COLE, AUBREY GRAHAM, DRAKE vs J.COLE, AGE 37/38, HEIGHT 6'2/6'3, TEAM OVO/DREAMVILLE, ALBUMS 9/6, HOMETOWN T.O./N.C., various ticker text
shots.audio: [Music continues with sports broadcast style voiceover and sound effects]

shots.composition: The camera performs a fast, dynamic zoom through the "TEAM" graphic from the sports broadcast, transitioning into the next scene with a high-energy visual effect.

The scene changes to a boxing ring in a dark arena. J. Cole, wearing a football jersey with the number 24, stands in the center of the ring, rapping into a vintage microphone hanging from above. He shadowboxes as he performs, surrounded by a silhouetted crowd.

shots.focus: The action is kept in focus.
shots.composition: A quick montage of shots, including hands drumming on a table in the dark and close-ups of J. Cole rapping passionately in the boxing ring. The quick cuts maintain the song's energetic pace.
A fast-moving point-of-view shot, likely from a car at night, creating streaks of light from buildings and streetlights. This shot serves as a rapid, abstract transition to the next scene.

J. Cole stands in front of a white van with the letters "F.A.T.D" on the side, a nod to Drake's album title "For All The Dogs." He is wearing a red shirt with a spider logo, a black overshirt, and red gloves/boots, evoking a Spider-Man theme.

A split-screen shot recreates the famous "Spider-Man pointing at Spider-Man" internet meme. On the left, J. Cole points. On the right, Drake, dressed in a full Spider-Man costume under a hockey jersey, points back at him against a brick wall background.

The two men are now on a real basketball court at night, still pointing at each other. The Toronto city skyline, with the CN Tower prominently featured, is visible in the background, grounding the scene in Drake's hometown.
Back at the van location, J. Cole picks up a basketball while looking at Drake (off-screen). The lighting is dark and moody, coming from the van's interior and a single overhead light.
J. Cole stands with the basketball, talking and gesturing towards Drake. He smiles confidently, setting up a challenge. The van with "F.A.T.D" remains in the background.

On the basketball court, J. Cole makes an incredibly long, high-arcing shot. The ball sails through the air and goes perfectly through the hoop. The other people on the court erupt in celebration at the amazing shot.
shots.audio: [Music continues, basketball swish SFX, crowd cheering]

shots.focus: Drake and J. Cole are in focus.
shots.composition: Drake, still in his Spider-Man costume, looks on in disbelief, then takes off his mask and walks away dejectedly. The camera pans to J. Cole, who celebrates his shot by walking confidently towards the camera. The scene playfully portrays J. Cole one-upping Drake.
Drake, now without the mask, stands near the brick wall and shoots a Spider-Man web from his wrist. This CGI effect shows him trying to reclaim his power after being bested at basketball.

shots.focus: The two men are in focus.
shots.composition: Two men on the basketball court, one in a red tank top, look on as the scene unfolds. They serve as background characters observing the main action between the two stars.

Drake, back on the basketball court, receives a pass and speaks to J. Cole, who stands watching with his arms crossed. The Toronto skyline is still visible. Drake is preparing to take his own impossible shot.
Drake, smiling confidently, throws the basketball high into the air. The camera follows the ball as it disappears into the night sky, implying an impossibly powerful throw.

The basketball is now shown in outer space, orbiting the Earth like a satellite. A trail of fire follows it as it moves across the planet, lit by the sun. This is a hyper-real, fantastical visual gag.
The basketball, now a flaming meteor, hurtles back towards Earth, aimed at the CN Tower in Toronto. The shot is dark and dramatic, with the city lights below.

In an indoor arena, the flaming basketball crashes through the ceiling, hits the backboard, and shatters it in a fiery explosion. Debris rains down as the camera captures the destruction in slow motion.

An exterior shot of an arena at night, presumably the Scotiabank Arena in Toronto. The marquee now reads "OCTOBER'S VERY OWN ARENA," and the OVO owl logo is prominently displayed. Pyrotechnic flames erupt from towers outside.
shots.graphicsOverlays: OCTOBER'S VERY OWN ARENA, OVO owl logo

shots.composition: A sinister figure wearing a dark, menacing bulldog mask stands behind a steamy, dirty window. The lighting is green and eerie, creating a threatening and mysterious mood.

shots.focus: The burning hoop is in focus.
shots.composition: Inside the darkened, empty arena, the broken basketball hoop is on the floor, engulfed in flames and smoke. The lights of the arena flicker on and off, creating a strobe effect and a post-apocalyptic atmosphere. Glowing footprints appear on the floor, leading towards the wreckage.
A ghostly, ethereal dog with glowing white fur walks down a dark corridor. The dog appears spectral and otherworldly. The camera tracks alongside it as it moves slowly and purposefully.
The shadow of the ghostly dog is cast upon a dark, tiled wall as it walks past. The shot is dark and mysterious, emphasizing the dog's phantom-like presence.

Drake, now wearing a large white and black fur coat, walks down a long, dark, narrow hallway, rapping aggressively towards the camera. The lighting is stark and blue, creating a cold, intimidating mood. He gestures emphatically as he performs.
A quick shot of a person in a menacing bulldog mask at night, under a streetlight. The shot is dark and slightly out of focus, adding to the unsettling vibe.
Drake continues walking and rapping down the hallway, his expression intense and angry. The camera tracks with him, maintaining the forward momentum and aggressive energy.
A group of people, all wearing different types of dog masks, walk together down a dark industrial walkway. They look like a menacing gang or pack.
Drake continues his performance in the hallway, making finger gun gestures and rapping with a high level of aggression.
A fisheye lens shot from above, looking down on the group in dog masks as they ride an escalator through an arched, glass-paneled tunnel. The lighting is dim and red.
Drake continues his performance in the hallway, now mimicking aiming and shooting a rifle. His movements are sharp and aggressive.
Another shot of the people in dog masks on the escalators in a dimly lit, industrial-looking space.
Drake puts on a thick silver chain and strikes a pose, spreading his arms wide in his fur coat. The camera continues to track forward with him in the hallway.
A sign in a subway station reads "Northbound 6 To October's Very Own Arena." A silver subway train rushes past the sign, creating a motion blur.
From a low angle, Drake walks towards a large, industrial freight elevator. The scene is dark and has a cold, blue tint.

shots.focus: The people on the train are in focus.
shots.composition: People in dog masks board a subway train. The shot is shaky and dark, viewed from the platform as they push their way on.
Drake stands in the center of the large, metallic elevator, surrounded by a pack of real dogs of various breeds, who are all sitting patiently. The elevator doors begin to close.

shots.focus: The dog collars and faces are in focus.
shots.composition: A series of quick close-up shots of the dogs in the elevator. They are all wearing bows and jeweled collars with female names: "NADINE," "CHRISTINE," "JUSTINE," and "KATHLEEN." The juxtaposition of the fierce rap with the pampered dogs is comedic.
Drake raps inside the elevator, which is lined with mirrors, creating multiple reflections of him. He is animated and energetic, pointing and gesturing at the camera.
A wide shot of Drake and the pack of dogs inside the elevator. He stands confidently among them as the elevator doors close completely.

shots.focus: The paw and button are in focus.
shots.composition: An extreme close-up of a monstrous, grey, clawed paw pressing the number '6' button on an elevator panel. This suggests a more sinister, non-human element is at play.
A chaotic, fast-moving shot from inside a rapidly ascending elevator, showing sparks and fire. The camera spins and shakes, conveying a sense of violent, out-of-control movement.
A point-of-view shot from the front of a subway train as it speeds through a dark tunnel towards a bright light at the end.
Inside the subway car, people in dog masks are packed together, seen through the window in the train door. The lighting is dim.
Drake continues to rap and gesture in the mirrored elevator, looking directly into the camera.
The subway doors open and the crowd of people wearing dog masks rushes out onto the platform in a chaotic swarm.
A subway train pulls into a station platform. A glowing green sign above reads "OVO ARENA." The scene is dark and atmospheric.
Drake, inside the mirrored elevator, continues his performance with intense energy, spreading his arms wide.

A black-and-white security camera view shows Drake and his dogs inside the elevator. Drake is rapping and gesturing towards the camera. The overlay provides a timestamp and camera details, adding a layer of surveillance to the scene.
The subway doors open and the crowd of people in dog masks pushes its way out of the train.
The freight elevator doors open, and the pack of real dogs rushes out into the dark corridor, running towards the camera.
A chaotic, first-person view of being rushed by the crowd of people in dog masks.

Drake stands on a rooftop at night, wearing a black and white Nike jacket. The city skyline is blurred in the background, and a fire burns in a barrel to his left. He looks contemplative, then turns and raps to the camera.

A low-angle shot shows Drake walking on an illuminated platform on the rooftop. The city buildings are visible in the background through a glass wall. The scene is dark, with Drake silhouetted against the city lights.
Drake continues his performance on the rooftop, gesturing with open hands. The fire and city lights create a dramatic backdrop.

Drake dances on an illuminated platform on a rooftop, positioned between large American and Canadian flags. In the distance, the CN Tower stands tall. This shot powerfully connects Drake to both his Canadian roots and his international stardom.
A shot of a massive, energetic crowd of people in dog masks partying in the street at night. They are holding up signs and celebrating wildly. Confetti falls from the sky.

Drake, now in a sparkly black jacket and a single white, jeweled glove (a clear Michael Jackson homage), dances and raps. A Canadian flag waves behind him. The camera is dynamic, moving with his performance.
A wide, distorted fisheye lens shot of the crowd outside the "OCTOBER'S VERY OWN ARENA." The scene is chaotic and celebratory, capturing the energy of a massive concert or event.

A giant, god-like hologram of a cloaked figure (resembling Drake) rises above the arena. Drones with spotlights fly around it, illuminating the figure. The crowd below looks up in awe at the massive spectacle.
A high-angle shot looking down at the crowd of people in dog masks. They are all looking up, with their hands raised, worshipping the giant figure above them.

shots.focus: Shallow depth of field, focused on the hand.
shots.composition: A close-up of a hand in a white jeweled glove making an "OK" gesture. In the soft-focus background is a Canadian flag and the giant statue. The shot is symbolic and visually striking.

An aerial shot pulling away from the giant statue of Drake over the arena. The camera reveals the vast cityscape of Toronto at night, with the statue standing as a monumental figure over the city. The shot conveys a sense of power and dominance.
A black screen with the director's credit in a stylized, bold, blue-outlined font.
